title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Context hygiene is a framework for maintaining conversation coherence in AI agents across multiple turns by organizing context into three layers: skills, harnesses, and hygiene practices. The approach uses behavioral files (CLAUDE.md), lazy loading, and multi-agent orchestration to preserve context windows and enable agents to remember user preferences without repetition.
